definition: The 1994-98 five-phase resolution sequence (term premium shock → fiscal consolidation → EM crisis → LTCM safe-haven validation → productivity boom) resolved the 1993-94 bifurcation into durable negative correlation. Today has Phase 1 only; Phase 2 (fiscal consolidation) is unavailable at 6-7% GDP deficits.
evidence: Each phase is historically documented with specific dates and mechanisms
Without Phase 2, Phases 3-5 cannot replicate even if catalysts emerge
Pair_0 debate endorsed as 'most rigorous use of analogue reasoning'
No political pathway to deficits below 4% GDP before 2028
open_questions: Whether an alternative resolution sequence exists that bypasses fiscal consolidation
Could AI productivity boom substitute for fiscal consolidation (Phase 5 without Phase 2)
